ExerciseTypes.name: Bodyweight
ExerciseTypes.description: Exercises performed using your own body weight.

ExerciseTypes.name: Machine
ExerciseTypes.description: Exercises performed using any gym machine.

ExerciseTypes.name: Cable
ExerciseTypes.description: Exercises performed using a cable stack machine.

ExerciseTypes.name: Other
ExerciseTypes.description: Exercises performed using other equipment or methods.

Exercise.name: Barbell Bench Press
Exercise.about: A compound pressing movement targeting the chest, shoulders, and triceps. Performed by lowering a barbell to the chest and pressing it until the arms are extended.

Exercise.name: Barbell Squat
Exercise.about: A lower-body compound lift where the barbell rests on the upper back. The lifter descends into a squat and stands back up, targeting quads, glutes, and core.

Exercise.name: Barbell Deadlift
Exercise.about: A hip-hinge movement starting from the floor. The barbell is lifted by extending the hips and knees, engaging posterior-chain muscles.

Exercise.name: Barbell Overhead Press
Exercise.about: A standing press where a barbell is pushed overhead from shoulder height, targeting shoulders and triceps.

Exercise.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
Exercise.about: A pulling exercise performed by hinging forward and rowing a barbell toward the torso to develop the back.

Exercise.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
Exercise.about: A pressing movement performed with dumbbells from shoulder height to overhead, strengthening shoulders and triceps.

Exercise.name: Dumbbell Chest Press
Exercise.about: Performed on a flat bench by pressing two dumbbells upward, focusing on the chest and supporting muscles.

Exercise.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
Exercise.about: An isolation movement curling dumbbells upward to strengthen the biceps.

Exercise.name: Dumbbell Lunges
Exercise.about: A unilateral leg movement where dumbbells are held while stepping forward into a lunge position.

Exercise.name: Pull-Up
Exercise.about: A vertical pulling exercise performed by lifting the body until the chin passes the bar, targeting the back and arms.

Exercise.name: Push-Up
Exercise.about: A horizontal pressing movement using bodyweight, targeting the chest, shoulders, and triceps.

Exercise.name: Bodyweight Squat
Exercise.about: A squat performed without external load, focusing on basic lower-body strength and control.

Exercise.name: Plank
Exercise.about: An isometric core exercise maintaining a straight-line body position on forearms and toes.

Exercise.name: Leg Press
Exercise.about: A compound leg movement performed on a machine that allows the lifter to press a weighted platform with the legs.

Exercise.name: Chest Press Machine
Exercise.about: A guided pressing exercise targeting chest muscles with controlled machine motion.

Exercise.name: Lat Pulldown
Exercise.about: A pulling exercise performed on a machine by drawing a bar down toward the chest to work back muscles.

Exercise.name: Seated Leg Curl Machine
Exercise.about: An isolation exercise where the hamstrings bend the legs against machine resistance.

Exercise.name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
Exercise.about: An isolation movement pushing a cable attachment downward using elbow extension.

Exercise.name: Cable Bicep Curl
Exercise.about: A curling motion performed on a cable machine for consistent resistance throughout the movement.

Exercise.name: Cable Fly
Exercise.about: A chest isolation movement performed standing between two cable stacks, bringing the arms together in a fly motion.

Exercise.name: Cable Row
Exercise.about: A seated pulling exercise where the cable handle is drawn toward the torso to target the back.

Exercise.name: Band Pull-Apart
Exercise.about: A shoulder and upper-back exercise where a resistance band is stretched apart at chest level.

Exercise.name: Band Squat
Exercise.about: A squat performed with a resistance band adding tension to the movement, enhancing leg and glute activation.

Exercise.name: Band Face Pull
Exercise.about: A pulling movement targeting rear delts and upper back using a resistance band anchored at eye level.

Exercise.name: Kettlebell Swing
Exercise.about: A dynamic hip-hinge motion using a kettlebell, focusing on glutes, hamstrings, and conditioning.

Exercise.name: Medicine Ball Slam
Exercise.about: A full-body power movement slamming a ball to the ground repeatedly.

Exercise.name: Sled Push
Exercise.about: A lower-body strength and conditioning drill pushing a weighted sled across the floor.

ExerciseVariants.name: Barbell Bench Press
ExerciseVariants.about: Standard flat barbell bench press.

ExerciseVariants.name: Barbell Back Squat
ExerciseVariants.about: Traditional barbell squat with bar placed on upper back.

ExerciseVariants.name: Conventional Deadlift
ExerciseVariants.about: Standard hip-hinge lift pulling the barbell from the floor.

ExerciseVariants.name: Sumo Deadlift
ExerciseVariants.about: Wide-stance deadlift variation with a more upright torso.

ExerciseVariants.name: Barbell Overhead Press
ExerciseVariants.about: Standing press performed by raising barbell overhead.

ExerciseVariants.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
ExerciseVariants.about: Rowing motion performed while leaning forward at the hip.

ExerciseVariants.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
ExerciseVariants.about: Seated or standing dumbbell press overhead.

ExerciseVariants.name: Unilateral Dumbbell Shoulder Press
ExerciseVariants.about: Shoulder press performed with one dumbbell at a time.

ExerciseVariants.name: Dumbbell Chest Press
ExerciseVariants.about: Flat dumbbell press targeting chest and triceps.

ExerciseVariants.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
ExerciseVariants.about: Standard curling motion using dumbbells.

ExerciseVariants.name: Unilateral Dumbbell Bicep Curl
ExerciseVariants.about: Curl performed with one dumbbell at a time for isolated focus.

ExerciseVariants.name: Dumbbell Lunges
ExerciseVariants.about: Stepping lunge holding dumbbells at the sides.

ExerciseVariants.name: Reverse Dumbbell Lunges
ExerciseVariants.about: Lunge variation stepping backward for improved hip stability.

ExerciseVariants.name: Weighted Pull-Up

ExerciseVariants.name: Bodyweight Squat

ExerciseVariants.about: Hamstring isolation using a machine.

ExerciseVariants.name: Cable Bicep Curl
ExerciseVariants.about: Curling motion using cable resistance.

ExerciseVariants.name: Cable Fly

ExerciseVariants.name: Cable Row
ExerciseVariants.about: Seated horizontal pulling movement using cables.

ExerciseVariants.name: Band Pull-Apart

ExerciseVariants.name: Band Squat

ExerciseVariants.name: Band Face Pull
